description:
#ICICILombardHealthShield #ICICILombardCompleteHealthInsurance

I am "Dharam Vir Singh - CFP", here to help you in choosing the best Health Insurance Policy, Call @ 📞 📱 9810244118


ICICI Health Shield:
ICICI Lombard's Health Shield is one of the most advanced health insurance products i.e designed to cover your Illness as well as your Wellness. This is a holistic plan designed to cater to your healthcare needs at all stages. 

In this video, we have discussed all the details of ICICI Lombard Health Shield Features, Benefits, Wellness program, Optional benefits & Product quality rating 😊

ICICI Lombard Health Shield key features are as follows:
✔️Pre-existing & Specified diseases cover only after 24 months.
✔️30 days Pre & 60 days Post Hospitalization Cover.
✔️Consumable Cover
✔️Organ donor Expense Cover
✔️Emergency Air Ambulance Cover
✔️Free Online Doctor Consultation
✔️Unlimited Restoration Benefit.


Curated by:

Dharam Vir Singh
(CFP)
(M) +91-9810244118

If I could provide some value for you, then Kindly Subscribe/Like/Press the bell icon of our Channel: https://youtube.com/c/AapkefaydekibaatDharam

comments.author: @gempire4135

comments.text:
The same experience occurred to me. But the negatives of HS 360 are not convincing to me. Next time when they contact you, pls ask the drawbacks of ICICI Health Shield 360 policy. I have been looking to purchase health insurance for the past few days. By my research, I found 2 drawbacks which HS 360 have

1. Post hospitalization days-
    90 days for HS 360
   180 days for Advantedge

2. If sum assured amt is exhausted-
    HS360: Reset benefit is not available for same person. Only other family members can avail the benefit 
   Advantedge: Reset benefit is available for the same person

Please ask the ICICI staff for more differences and kindly educate me also 🙏🏼
